mapper.select: SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.category_id, t.created_by, t.created_at, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id ORDER BY t.id

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.category_id, t.created_by, t.created_at, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id
t.category_id = #{categoryId}
ORDER BY
CASE WHEN t.deadline IS NULL THEN 1 ELSE 0 END, t.deadline, t.id
CASE t.priority WHEN 'HIGH' THEN 1 WHEN 'MEDIUM' THEN 2 WHEN 'LOW' THEN 3 ELSE 2 END, t.id
t.id
LIMIT #{limit} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT t.id, t.title, t.completed, t.priority, t.deadline, t.category_id, t.created_by, t.created_at, c.name AS category_name, c.color AS category_color FROM todos t LEFT JOIN categories c ON t.category_id = c.id WHERE t.id = #{id}
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO todos (title, completed, priority, deadline, category_id, created_by, created_at) VALUES (#{title}, #{completed}, #{priority}, #{deadline}, #{categoryId}, #{createdBy}, #{createdAt})
mapper.update: UPDATE todos SET title = #{title}, completed = #{completed}, priority = #{priority}, deadline = #{deadline}, category_id = #{categoryId} WHERE id = #{id}
